hero.headline: Fuel management for modern fleets
hero.subtext: Full control over fuel and delivery costs. Save up to 30% without losing speed — orders, limits and reports in one platform.
hero.chooseRole: Choose how you want to work
hero.chooseRoleDesc: Managers and drivers have separate dashboards.
hero.managerCabinetDesc: Manage vehicles, limits, and drivers for your company.
hero.driverCabinetDesc: Order fuel by vehicle number and phone—no registration required.

limits.title: Fleet fuel limits
limits.desc: Control every vehicle's consumption and stop overruns in one click.

driverOrdering.title: Driver ordering
driverOrdering.desc: Drivers request fuel by vehicle number — managers approve in seconds.

delivery.title: Delivery tracking
delivery.desc: Watch delivery status in real time — from request to the tank.

invoices.title: Automated invoices
invoices.desc: Get ready-made invoices and usage reports automatically — no manual work.

analytics.title: Analytics dashboard
analytics.desc: All your fuel spend and fleet performance in one dashboard.

step1.title: Driver requests fuel
step1.desc: Driver enters vehicle number and submits a fuel request.

step2.title: Manager approves
step2.desc: Fleet manager controls limits and approvals.

step3.title: Fuel is delivered
step3.desc: Fuel truck delivers directly to the vehicle.

step4.title: Reporting
step4.desc: Fuel usage automatically tracked and invoiced.

interactiveDemo.title: Interactive Fleet Demo
interactiveDemo.demoHint: Click "Simulate Fuel Request" to see a system notification, then "Simulate Delivery" to run the flow.

benefits.title: Why fleet operators choose Benzeen
benefits.ctaTitle: See how much your fleet can save with Benzeen

costControl.title: Cut your fuel spend
costControl.desc: Per-vehicle limits stop overspending — save up to 30%.

visibility.title: See your whole fleet in real time
visibility.desc: Track every vehicle's consumption without calls or spreadsheets.

reports.title: Reports in minutes, not hours
reports.desc: Invoices and reports generated automatically — close the month faster.

delivery.title: Fuel where you need it
delivery.desc: Delivered to your vehicles anywhere in the city, next day.

dashboardPreview.title: Your fleet at a glance
dashboardPreview.subtitle: Real-time visibility into vehicles, limits, and usage.

socialProof.title: Trusted by Fleet Operators
socialProof.metricsTitle: What it means for your fleet

pricing.title: Plans for every fleet size
pricing.intro: Pricing depends on fleet size and business needs. Choose the plan that fits your operations.

starter.name: Starter
starter.features:
Fuel delivery for company fleets
Vehicle-level fuel limits
Driver account management
Request approval workflow
Basic usage reports

business.name: Business
business.features:
Everything in Starter
Delivery tracking
Usage reports and analytics
Invoice-ready reporting
Priority support

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.features:
Unlimited vehicles
Dedicated account manager
Custom integrations
API access
24/7 priority support

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.success: Message sent. We'll get back to you shortly.
contact.error: Send failed. Try again or contact us by phone.

auth.chooseRoleTitle: How do you want to sign in?

managerLogin.title: Company Manager Login
managerLogin.subtitle: Sign in to manage your company fleet.
managerLogin.demo: Your login and password are issued by an administrator

driverLogin.title: Driver Access
driverLogin.subtitle: Order fuel using your vehicle and phone number.
driverLogin.errorPhoneCode: Enter phone number and SMS code

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Sign in to your account.
login.managerSubtitle: Enter your company login and password.
login.driverSubtitle: Enter the details provided by your company manager.
login.errorPhoneCode: Enter phone number and SMS code
login.demo: Your login and password are issued by an administrator

signup.title: Create account
signup.subtitle: Enter your details to create a company account.
signup.subtitleStep1: Enter your details to create a company account.
signup.step2Subtitle: Choose where to send your verification code.
signup.sentToEmail: We sent a 6-digit verification code to your email.
signup.sentToPhone: We sent a 6-digit verification code to your phone number.
signup.noEmailHint: No email? In development the code is printed in the terminal where you run npm run dev. To receive real emails, add RESEND_API_KEY to .env — see SETUP.md.

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.requiredFields: Please fill in all required fields
validation.emailInUse: This email is already in use
validation.codeExpired: Code expired. Request a new one.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a recovery code.
forgotPassword.success: Recovery code sent. Check your email.

resetPassword.title: Reset password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter the code from your email and choose a new password.
resetPassword.success: Password successfully updated. You can now log in.

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters

limits.title: Limits
limits.subtitle: Set and edit fuel limits per vehicle. Green = within limit, yellow = near limit, red = exceeded.
limits.noCarsDesc: Add vehicles in the Vehicles section to set limits.
limits.errorBelowUsed: Limit cannot be lower than used liters ({used} L)

admin.title: Admin dashboard
admin.subtitle: Companies, cars, and orders. Filter by status.
admin.noAccessCompanies: You do not have access to manage companies.
admin.noAccessDrivers: You do not have access to manage drivers.

myVehicle.title: My vehicle
myVehicle.subtitle: Assigned vehicle details. Editing is not available.
myVehicle.noVehicle: No vehicle assigned yet. Contact your manager.

myLimit.title: My limit
myLimit.subtitle: Fuel usage for your vehicles this month.

driverDashboard.title: Driver dashboard
driverDashboard.subtitle: Your vehicles, limits, and order creation.
driverDashboard.noCarsAssigned: You have no vehicles assigned yet.

drivers.name: Name
drivers.noDriversDesc: Add drivers so they can create orders

cars.noCarsDesc: Add your first car to start tracking fuel and limits

orders.title: Orders
orders.requestsSubtitle: Approve or reject driver fuel requests. Approved requests become deliveries.
orders.deliveriesSubtitle: Track delivery status: scheduled, in progress, or completed.

empty.title: No orders
empty.desc: Create your first fuel order for your car

dispatcher.newOrdersDesc: Orders awaiting receipt and courier assignment.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Order approvals, deliveries and limit updates
notifications.emptyHint: Order status is updated by Benzeen dispatcher. When your order is accepted, a courier is assigned, or delivery is completed, you'll see it here and in My Orders.
